records.question: Which actors have the name Tom Oliver and played the character Lou Carpenter?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.character = 'Lou Carpenter' AND actor.name = 'Tom Oliver'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Actor_ID FROM actor WHERE Name = 'Tom Oliver' AND Character = 'Lou Carpenter'

records.question: Which actors named Kate Ritchie played Sally Fletcher, had an age of at most 20, and whose duration includes 1988–2008?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.duration LIKE '%1988–2008%' AND actor.character = 'Sally Fletcher' AND actor.age <= 20 AND actor.name = 'Kate Ritchie'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Actor_ID FROM actor WHERE Name = 'Kate Ritchie' AND Character = 'Sally Fletcher' AND age <= 20 AND Duration LIKE '%1988–2008%'

records.question: Which actors are exactly 21 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.age = 21
records.pred_sql: SELECT Actor_ID FROM actor WHERE age = 21

records.question: Which actors named Ryan Moloney have durations containing 1995?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.name = 'Ryan Moloney' AND actor.duration LIKE '%1995%'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Actor_ID FROM actor WHERE Name = 'Ryan Moloney' AND Duration LIKE '%1995%'

records.question: Which actors playing Paul Robinson are linked to another actor by matching their musical ID to that actor’s ID?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
JOIN actor AS actor__1 ON actor.musical_id = actor__1.actor_id
WHERE actor.character = 'Paul Robinson'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.Actor_ID
FROM actor AS T1
INNER JOIN actor AS T2
  ON T1.Musical_ID = T2.Actor_ID
WHERE
  T1.Character = 'Paul Robinson' AND T1.Actor_ID != T2.Actor_ID

records.question: Which actors named Tom Oliver are at most 22 years old and associated with another actor through their musical ID?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
JOIN actor AS actor__1 ON actor.musical_id = actor__1.actor_id
WHERE actor.age <= 22 AND actor.name = 'Tom Oliver'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Actor_ID FROM actor AS T1 WHERE T1.Name = 'Tom Oliver' AND T1.age <= 22 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM actor AS T2 WHERE T2.Musical_ID = T1.Musical_ID AND T2.Actor_ID != T1.Actor_ID )

records.question: What actors named Ian Smith, who played Harold Bishop and are exactly 17 years old, have a duration containing 1996–2009?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.duration LIKE '%1996–2009%' AND actor.age = 17 AND actor.name = 'Ian Smith' AND actor.character = 'Harold Bishop'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Actor_ID FROM actor WHERE Name = 'Ian Smith' AND Character = 'Harold Bishop' AND age = 17 AND Duration LIKE '%1996–2009%'

records.question: What actors named Lynne McGranger playing Irene Roberts have been active in durations containing 1993— and are at least 21 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actor_id FROM actor
WHERE actor.name = 'Lynne McGranger' AND actor.character = 'Irene Roberts' AND actor.duration LIKE '%1993—%' AND actor.age >= 21
records.pred_sql: SELECT Actor_ID FROM actor WHERE Name = 'Lynne McGranger' AND Character = 'Irene Roberts' AND Duration LIKE '%1993—%' AND age >= 21
